---
title: "ggplot2 example"
description: "Check how pkgdown renders a simple ggplot2 figure."
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  dev = "ragg_png"
)
```

Example **ggplot2** image.

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| fig-alt: A ggplot2 image
#| fig-cap: A ggplot2 image
library(ggplot2)

# Count observations by class.
g <- ggplot(mpg, aes(class))
# Plot the number of cars in each class.
g + geom_bar()
```
